texto: In France, I guess there's something like a tyranny in mentalities - we accept success badly, beauty, money. People are certainly envious, and this creates negative energy. This is annoying. I suffered a great deal at one time. I had to fight harder than others. Add to that my marriage to Polanski.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Emmanuelle Seigner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “In France, I guess there's something like a tyranny in mentalities - we accept success badly, bea…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, success, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e time.
